IN THE NEWS
UENI helps you generate more sales, bookings, and leads with a gorgeous website that’s built for you at a reasonable price. No expensive agencies, no complicated DIY web design builders —just a product that works for you.
WE’RE THE #1 SOLUTION FOR SMALL BUSINESSES
THE UENI PROMISE:
We’ll build your business a beautiful website in 7 days

WHY CHOOSE UENI
We help you grow your business

Save time & money
Save yourself the time and frustration of trying to build your own website. Save yourself the money of hiring an agency to do it for you. UENI provides the solution for small business: agency-like quality at the price of a do-it-yourself platform, and a team that’s here to help you to launch your website and build your online presence.

WHY CHOOSE UENI
It's the hassle-free way to get your business online
Zero risk to get started. Not satisfied? Just email our customer success team for a full refund.
Done for you 
We build your website and Google Business Profile for you; we are not a do-it-yourself website builder.
Truly affordable
There's no catch; pay $199 one-time to get your website setup and launched. Free hosting for life. Upgrade only when you want to grow your business.
Made with care
Real humans build your website, not some robots. Our team guides you before, during and after launch.
Get more business
Start making sales and taking bookings from day one. Accelerate your growth with our hands-on help.
DIY website builders hand you the toolbox, but don’t show you how to use the tools
"Hands off" customer support
Cater to people who already have web design skills
TESTIMONIALS
What our customers say
UENI's Founder, Christine Telyan
INTERVIEW
UENI: How Founder's Toothache Led To A Web Shake-Up
Entrepreneur Christine Telyan vowed to make all businesses visible online after struggling to find a local dentist. She now runs UENI, a “digital agency for the masses”.
INTERVIEW
As a company focused on getting very small businesses online, UENI builds sites that cover off many of the web marketing basics, such as registration with Maps and My Business.

To make it as simple as possible, UENI asks users to fill in a questionnaire about their businesses and this - along with any supplied visuals, such as logos - is used to create the site.
